text:
Project Demonstration - Extension (EFCHIP) - This demonstration aims to develop and test new models of integrated, coordinated health care in the most sparsely-populated rural counties with the goal of improving health outcomes and reducing Medicare expenditures.
Graduate Nurse Education (GNE) Demonstration - Under the Graduate Nurse Education Demonstration, CMS provided reimbursements to up to five eligible hospitals for the reasonable cost of providing clinical training to advanced practice
